title: lippia aberrans
intro: Lippia aberrans, also known as Mexican verbena, is a plant species that belongs to the Verbenaceae family and is native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lippia aberrans include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
